name: Christmas Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine cranberries and finely chopped oranges.
2. Add undrained pineapple and crush some of the cranberries using a potato masher.
3. Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in finely chopped apricots and Certo pectin crystals.
5. Bring to a full rolling boil over high heat.
6. Stir in sugar.
7. Continue boiling until a full rolling boil is reached, then boil for an additional 1½ minutes.
8. Remove from heat and stir to remove any foam that forms on the surface.
9. Pour into sterilized jars, leaving ¼ inch headspace.
10. Process in a boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
Makes 8 cups.
